edit_summary: Round-1 findings applied (both reviewer-B Majors plus one hardening item): (1) AMBIGUITY — Field Definitions now define cross_gates (repo-relative gate-script paths outside driver_scripts; existence verified by AC-001; consumed by the AC-010 invariant leg; empty only for skill-instruction entries) and artifact_schemas (exact schema strings matched by equality; consumed by assert_artifacts_schema/AC-007 and registration-forcing/AC-001), and a Domain-review terminal disambiguation entry resolves the INV-001 '(AC-014)' cross-reference (it names the domain-review loop's own contract, not this feature's AC-014; the inventory terminal for domain-review is round-3 BLOCKED; investigation.md stays hash-frozen so the clarification lives in requirements.md). (2) EDGE-CASE-COVERAGE — new AC-018/TEST-018: escalation counting fixture with T-0010-referencing reports counted against T-001 stays 0 (word-boundary), with a substring-grep negative self-check; the Edge Cases entry now cites it. (3) Hardening: the suite-runtime-cost risk mitigation is operationalized as AC-017/TEST-017 (each new suite self-measures wall-clock, prints seconds in its summary, fails above a fixed 300s ceiling; threshold-0 negative self-check), replacing the ambiguous 'existing suite median' wording.
